demographics.occupation: unable to work due to a disability; on disability support benefits
demographics.living_situation: lives alone; extended family nearby but the patient feels a financial burden to them

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I had to halve my pills to make them last until payday, and now my body is failing, but I can't afford an ambulance.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last two weeks I have been splitting my medication and skipping meals to save money, and today I have gone downhill fast — I feel like my body is shutting down.

symptom_narrative.onset: a sharp deterioration today, after about two weeks of gradually cutting back
symptom_narrative.duration: getting steadily worse over two weeks, with a sudden crash today
symptom_narrative.character: overwhelming weakness and exhaustion; my body feels like it is failing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I have ever felt — I can barely move
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it got much worse once I ran out of my medication completely and stopped eating properly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel shaky and light-headed, I have not slept in about three days from worrying about bills, and I feel ashamed and like a burden
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I have been stuck in bed for the last day; I am too weak to stand for long

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a chronic illness I take a daily medication for
past_medical_history.how_managed: one essential daily medication that I normally never miss

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a disability that stops me working

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: my main daily medication for my chronic illness
current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: I have been taking half of my normal amount for two weeks and now I have completely run out

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I have been eating very little to make food last — the fridge is nearly empty
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I am in severe financial hardship: unopened medical bills are piling up, I have the heating off to save money, and I dread opening the mail. I cannot afford my medication, food, or an ambulance, and I feel I am a burden on my family.

access_barriers.financial: extreme financial hardship — cannot afford essential medication, adequate food, or an ambulance; is rationing life-sustaining medication and avoiding emergency care because of cost

objective_data_offered.value: about 62 kg, and I think I have lost weight recently
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own estimate, no calibrated scale reported

objective_data_offered.value: when I try to stand I go really light-headed and my heart pounds
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported orthostatic symptom, no home blood-pressure device available
